description_long: This is a brown glass bottle with a long neck and a white metal cap. The front of the bottle features a large white label with ornate black text reading 'Black Briar Mead' and a decorative border, along with a central illustration. The bottle has a smooth, cylindrical body that tapers slightly at the neck, and the cap appears to be crimped onto the top. The label wraps partially around the bottle, with the back side left unadorned. The surface of the bottle is matte and unreflective, suggesting a non-glossy finish. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle appears clean and intact.
description: A brown glass bottle with a white cap and a decorative 'Black Briar Mead' label on the front. The bottle is smooth, matte, and undamaged.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen at an angle, showing part of the white label with black decorative elements and text.
description_view_1: The back of the bottle is visible, showing a plain brown surface with no label or markings.
description_view_2: A side view reveals the edge of the label and the smooth, unadorned brown glass surface.
description_view_3: The front view clearly displays the full 'Black Briar Mead' label with ornate black text and illustration.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large white label on the front with ornate black text reading 'Black Briar Mead' and decorative illustrations. The label is rectangular and covers a significant portion of the bottle's front.
